title: Replace The Z-Axis Cable Carrier
summary: Replace the Z-Axis cable carrier using the listed replacement part, PPE, and tools, and verify divider placement so the air line does not contact the FFC. The source confirms the carrier can be fully replaced and that the links snap together and apart, but it does not provide a complete removal and installation sequence.
when_to_use: Use when the Z-Axis cable carrier needs full replacement and the technician needs source-supported guidance on required PPE, tools, carrier identification, snap-apart/snap-together handling, and divider positioning.
not_for: Do not use as a complete removal and installation procedure when a full step-by-step sequence is required, because the source does not provide one.
Do not use when the task requires unsupported decisions beyond the source-provided replacement, snap-apart handling, and divider-position verification guidance.

roles_and_responsibilities.responsibility: Perform the physical replacement, inspect divider placement, and verify the snap-together carrier links are fully connected.

safety_notes: Support safety is not established as safe for general operator execution in the source candidate; treat as maintenance work requiring L2 support.
Ensure divider placement prevents the air line from contacting the FFC.
access_or_tools_needed: Physical access to the Z-Axis cable carrier

access_required: Physical access to the Z-Axis cable carrier
system_preconditions: Replacement Z-Axis cable carrier is available before starting.

visual_references.description: Figure 7-17 Cable Carrier for identifying the Z-Axis cable carrier assembly and reviewing divider placement context.

steps.title: Put on required PPE
steps.purpose: Prepare for maintenance work using the PPE identified by the source.
steps.instruction: Put on safety glasses and gloves before handling the Z-Axis cable carrier replacement task.
steps.expected_result: Required PPE is in place before physical work begins.
steps.healthy_condition: Safety glasses and gloves are worn.
steps.failure_condition: Required PPE is not available or not worn.

actions.label: Wear PPE
actions.exact_action: Put on the required PPE: safety glasses and gloves.

steps.title: Gather replacement part and tools
steps.purpose: Ensure all source-listed items are available before starting replacement.
steps.instruction: Obtain the replacement Z-Axis cable carrier and the listed tools: standard screwdriver, 1.5-mm hex wrench, and 3/8-in. wrench or socket.
steps.expected_result: All required parts and tools are available at the work area.
steps.healthy_condition: Replacement part and all listed tools are present.
steps.failure_condition: One or more required parts or tools are missing.

actions.label: Collect parts and tools
actions.exact_action: Obtain the listed replacement part and tools: Z-Axis cable carrier, standard screwdriver, 1.5-mm hex wrench, and 3/8-in. wrench/socket.

stop_or_escalate_if: The replacement Z-Axis cable carrier is not available.

steps.title: Identify the Z-Axis cable carrier assembly
steps.purpose: Confirm the correct assembly is being serviced.
steps.instruction: Locate the existing Z-Axis cable carrier assembly and use Figure 7-17 to identify the part being replaced.
steps.expected_result: The technician has positively identified the Z-Axis cable carrier assembly.
steps.healthy_condition: The cable carrier assembly matches the source figure and replacement target.
steps.failure_condition: The assembly cannot be confidently identified from the available source evidence.

actions.label: Locate cable carrier
actions.exact_action: Locate the existing Z-Axis cable carrier assembly.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The Z-Axis cable carrier assembly shown in Figure 7-17 to identify the part being replaced.

stop_or_escalate_if: The Z-Axis cable carrier assembly cannot be positively identified.

steps.title: Remove or snap apart the existing cable carrier
steps.purpose: Disassemble the existing snap-together carrier using the source-supported method.
steps.instruction: Snap apart or remove the existing cable carrier by hand, or use a small standard screwdriver where needed, because the carrier snaps together and apart.
steps.expected_result: The existing cable carrier is separated or removed using the snap-apart method described by the source.
steps.healthy_condition: Carrier links separate as expected by hand or with a small standard screwdriver.
steps.failure_condition: The carrier cannot be separated using the source-described method, or removal cannot be completed from the available source information.

actions.label: Snap apart carrier
actions.exact_action: Snap apart or remove the existing cable carrier using by-hand separation or a small standard screwdriver where needed.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The cable carrier construction and link arrangement referenced by Figure 7-17 while separating the snap-together carrier.

stop_or_escalate_if: The replacement cannot be completed from the source-provided information because the section does not provide a full removal and installation sequence.
The carrier does not separate by hand or with a small standard screwdriver as described.

steps.title: Install the replacement cable carrier
steps.purpose: Place the new Z-Axis cable carrier into service position.
steps.instruction: Install the replacement Z-Axis cable carrier, using the source-supported understanding that the carrier links snap together.
steps.expected_result: The replacement cable carrier is installed in place of the old carrier.
steps.healthy_condition: The replacement carrier is positioned and assembled for final verification.
steps.failure_condition: The replacement carrier cannot be installed from the available source information.

actions.label: Install replacement carrier
actions.exact_action: Install the replacement Z-Axis cable carrier.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: The cable carrier assembly in Figure 7-17 as a visual reference during replacement installation.

stop_or_escalate_if: The replacement cannot be completed from the source-provided information because the section does not provide a full removal and installation sequence.

steps.title: Inspect divider placement in the carrier links
steps.purpose: Verify the divider arrangement between the cable and air line in the replacement carrier.
steps.instruction: Check the dividers between the cable and the air line in every second link and verify their position using Figure 7-17.
steps.expected_result: Divider presence and placement are reviewed across the carrier links.
steps.healthy_condition: Dividers are present between the cable and air line in every second link as described, with placement ready for final positioning verification.
steps.failure_condition: Divider placement is unclear, incorrect, or suggests the air line may contact the FFC.

actions.label: Inspect dividers
actions.exact_action: Check the dividers between the cable and the air line in every second link and verify their position.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Dividers between the cable and air line and the correct side for divider placement.

stop_or_escalate_if: Divider placement cannot be verified from the available source evidence.
The air line may contact the FFC after replacement.

steps.title: Set dividers against the air line
steps.purpose: Prevent the air line from contacting the FFC.
steps.instruction: Position the dividers all the way to one side against the air line.
steps.expected_result: Divider placement protects the FFC from air-line contact.
steps.healthy_condition: Dividers are fully to one side against the air line and the air line is kept away from the FFC.
steps.failure_condition: Divider placement allows or may allow the air line to contact the FFC.

actions.label: Position dividers
actions.exact_action: Position the dividers all the way to one side against the air line to prevent the air line from contacting the FFC.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Divider orientation relative to the air line so the divider is fully to one side against the air line.

stop_or_escalate_if: The air line may contact the FFC after replacement.

steps.title: Verify all snap-together links are fully connected
steps.purpose: Confirm the replacement carrier is fully assembled after installation.
steps.instruction: Verify the replacement carrier is assembled with the snap-together links fully connected.
steps.expected_result: The replacement carrier is fully assembled and ready for service.
steps.healthy_condition: All carrier links are fully snapped together and the divider placement remains correct.
steps.failure_condition: One or more links are not fully connected, or final assembly leaves risk of air-line contact with the FFC.

actions.label: Verify link connection
actions.exact_action: Verify the replacement carrier is assembled with the snap-together links fully connected.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Overall cable carrier assembly in Figure 7-17 while confirming the replacement links are fully connected.

stop_or_escalate_if: Links do not remain fully connected.
The air line may contact the FFC after replacement.

success_criteria: The Z-Axis cable carrier is replaced.
The replacement carrier is assembled with snap-together links fully connected.
Dividers are positioned all the way to one side against the air line.
The air line does not contact the FFC.
healthy_conditions: Required replacement part and tools are available.
The correct Z-Axis cable carrier assembly is identified.
Carrier links snap apart and back together as described by the source.
Dividers are positioned against the air line.
The air line is prevented from contacting the FFC.
failure_conditions: The replacement cannot be completed from the source-provided information because the section does not provide a full removal and installation sequence.
The Z-Axis cable carrier assembly cannot be confidently identified.
The carrier cannot be separated or reassembled using the source-described snap-together method.
The air line may contact the FFC after replacement.
escalation_guidance: Escalate if the replacement cannot be completed from the source-provided information because the section does not provide a full removal and installation sequence.
Escalate if the air line may contact the FFC after replacement.

screens_or_images.what_to_look_at: Z-Axis cable carrier assembly and divider placement reference from Figure 7-17.

missing_details: The source does not provide a complete step-by-step removal and installation sequence for full cable carrier replacement.
The source does not specify whether production stop is required.
The source does not specify whether LOTO is required for this procedure.
The source does not provide an estimated completion time.
The source does not define detailed role boundaries beyond maintenance-style execution.
